name: Vidalia Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bacon in a 10-inch skillet until crisp. Remove and drain on paper towels.
2. Cook onions and garlic in the drippings until tender. Discard the drippings and drain the vegetables in a strainer.
3. In a large bowl, combine the cheese, half & half, flour, salt, and pepper. Blend until smooth.
4. Add eggs one at a time, blending until smooth.
5. Reserve 2 tablespoons of bacon for garnish. Stir the remaining bacon and cooked veggies mixture into the cheese mixture.
6. Grease the sides of an 8 or 9-inch springform pan lightly.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 40 minutes, or until the center is just set.
9. Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire cooling rack to room temperature.
10. Garnish with the remaining bacon and serve with assorted crackers. You can also use it as hors d'oeuvres.
Recipe from Bland Farms pamphlet.
